faqs.question: What spider species are most common in College Point homes?
faqs.answer: College Point residents most frequently encounter common house spiders, cellar spiders, and wolf spiders. Due to the waterfront location, you may also see fishing spiders near properties close to the East River or Flushing Bay. Our treatments target all common species found in Queens homes.
